evidence.text: and systems, including ServiceNow. Tight integration with Microsoft Foundry capabilities resulted in even better agentic performance. An enterprise-wide agent for employees now handles more than 2,000 inquiries per month, saving 2,400 hours a year. A customer-facing agent serves more than 1,000 weekly users with a satisfaction rating of over 80% - often reaching 90%.
